title: Cool Mace
description: This resource pack will change the texture of the mace. Now it won't look like a rattle, it will REALLY be a mace. Lol
body: This resource pack will give a fresh look at the new weapon update 1.21 "Mace".  Now it won't be 2d, and it won't look like a rattle either. Now it can really be called a mace!
